description: Authoring reference — valid psionic selection categories per genre. Rows in the psionic catalog use genrePlacements[] in palladium-psionic.schema.json.

nightbane.label: Nightbane

categories.label: Super/Master Abilities
categories.notes: Advanced psionics (e.g. Between the Shadows super-psionic list).

nightbane.selectionRules: Psychic P.C.C.: 2 picks from each category at 1st level; +1 pick from any category per additional level (p. 70). Innate starters: See Aura, Sense Evil, Meditation, Presence Sense.

rifts.label: Rifts
rifts.notes: Some powers classified as Physical in Nightbane appear under Sensitive or Healing in Rifts — record per-power overrides in genrePlacements.
